tool_args.label: Capital Program Committee Meeting Book November 2022

payload.title: Capital Program Committee Meeting
payload.description: Capital Program Committee Meeting book containing meeting agenda, minutes from October 24 2022, committee work plan, capital program updates on Signals & Train Control and Systems projects, safety report, M/WBE/DBE/SDVOB participation, capital program commitments/completions/funding status, and procurement actions for November 2022.

Provide CBTC from 59 St in Manhattan through High St in Brooklyn for A, C, E services. Includes axle counters, interlockings, and carbone equipment for R179 and R211 cars.

warnings: project.subway_lines is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Subway line lists are external service context.

payload.description: First interoperable CBTC project for NYCT from Union Turnpike in Queens through 50 St/8 Av on the 53 St line and 21 St/Queensbridge on the 63 St Line. Includes equipping 335 R-160 units.
payload.status: CBTC fully in service since February 2022; ATS-B in-service; system stability issues ongoing

payload.description: Signal modernization between W 8 St and Church Av in Brooklyn. Improves 4.7 route miles for 12 subway stations. Tutor Perini primary contractor with Siemens as CBTC supplier.
CBTC from north of Union Turnpike to 179 St Station on the F line (Hillside Av). Mitsubishi first major CBTC project with MTA. Modernizes four interlockings.
payload.status: Under construction; Installer 10% complete, CBTC supplier 15% complete

payload.description: New digital radio system for NYCT and MTA Bus fleet of 6,000+ buses and non-revenue vehicles. Includes 37 base radio sites, Bus Command Center fit-out, and new computer aided dispatch system.
